sections.paragraph:
not used in Kal, pr. to snore, to sleep heavily, an onomatop. word. Compare Gr. δαρθάνω, δέρθω (to snore), and the Lat. dormio.

Niphal נִרְדַּם-

(1) to sleep heavily, Pro 10:5 Jon 1:5, Jon 1:6.

(2) to fall down astounded, Dan 8:18 10:9 Psa 76:7. Compare Jud. 4:21 .

Derivative, תַּרְדֵּמָה.
